CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Sanctions Against Defendant Erik Dubon For Failure To Comply With Courts Discovery Order; Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Dec-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; PLAINTIFF GERARD WOODS' Motion For Award Of Sanctions Against Defendant Erik Dubon For Failure To Comply With Courts Discovery Order; Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion is taken off calendar. Matter heard and decided on December 6, 2017. Judge: Gregory A. Call; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (HK/JPT/D301).

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Sanctions Against Defendant Erik Dubon Or Failure To Comply With Discovery Order; Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Dec-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ruling: PLAINTIFF GERARD WOODS Motion For Award Of Sanctions Against Defendant Erik Dubon Or Failure To Comply With Discovery Order is GRANTED. The moving party shall prepare a Proposed Order and submit it to the Court with proof of service on Defendant Dubon. Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Gray; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Erik Dubon; Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Oct-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, B. Scott Levine of the law offices of B. Scott Levine (510-763-2300) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

Stipulation to judge pro tem is signed and filed. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF GERARD WOODS' Motion To Compel Discovery And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Erik Dubon is Granted, no opposition filed. Sanctions awarded against Eric Dubon in the amount of $1,422.50, to be paid to moving party's counsel within 10 days of service of this order. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
